optimized_evidence:
[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2019-01-25
[TITLE]: No, this image doesn’t show Merkel, May and the Lithuanian president hanging out as teenagers – Full Fact
[METADATA/INTRO]: What was claimed Angela Merkel, Theresa May and the Lithuanian President were pictured together at a party in their youth....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Primarily, because the woman in the middle looks nothing like Mrs May. The image of Mrs Merkel and her friends is reportedly from New Year’s Eve 1972. There is at least one image of Mrs May at school in 1971, as well as other photos of her in her teenage years: they bear little resemblance to the woman in this photograph. (They do very clearly look like a young Theresa May.) 
 We haven’t found a verified picture of Mrs Grybauskaitė from a similar time period. But the Lithuanian Embassy in London told us that the woman on the right is not Mrs Grybauskaitė.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2024-09-04
[TITLE]: No, esta foto no muestra a Ángela Merkel, Theresa May y Dalia Grybauskaitė juntas cuando eran adolescentes - Chequeado
[METADATA/INTRO]: No, esta foto no muestra a Ángela Merkel, Theresa May y Dalia Grybauskaitė juntas cuando eran adolescentes - Circula en redes sociales una imagen donde aparecen 3 jóvenes que, según posteos virales, serían Ángela Merkel (ex canciller alemana), Theresa May...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Finalmente, aunque no se han encontrado imágenes de una joven Dalia Grybauskaite, sí hay varios registros fotográficos de Theresa May de joven, donde luce visiblemente diferente a la mujer sentada en el centro de la foto viral con Merkel. 
 Un artículo de 2016 de la BBC comparte una fotografía escolar de May (en el centro de la imagen). La misma fue tomada en 1971, en la institución Holton Park Grammar School, que desde entonces se convirtió en Wheatley Park Comprehensive. 
 En tanto, en una nota de The Business Insider publicada en 2017, puede verse una imagen de la ex ministra británica de niña. “Nació como Theresa Mary Brasier el 1 de octubre de 1956, en una familia de clase media en Eastbourne, Sussex. Era hija del vicario de la Iglesia de Inglaterra, Hubert, y su esposa, Zaidee”.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2020-05-15
[TITLE]: LRT FACTS. Did Dalia GrybauskaitÄ, Angela Merkel and Theresa May go to the same school? - LRT
[METADATA/INTRO]: An old photo, allegedly of Lithuania's former president and leaders of Germany and the UK, keeps circulating online, spawning controversies that the three women are part of a global conspiracy. The black-and-white photo of three teenaged girls, alongside present-day images...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: An old photo, allegedly of Lithuania's former president and leaders of Germany and the UK, keeps circulating online, spawning controversies that the three women are part of a global conspiracy. 
 The black-and-white photo of three teenaged girls, alongside present-day images of Lithuania's former president Dalia GrybauskaitÄ, German Chancellor Angela Merkel and the UK's former prime minister Theresa May, started circulating on Lithuanian social media last month. 
 âThat's how things truly are; unfortunately, I couldn't find the article,â wrote the Lithuanian Facebook user who posted the collage, implying that the three leaders had known each other for much longer than one might think.
